query:
SELECT o.id as orgId, o.name, o.primaryAdminId, u.email as adminEmail, u.name as adminName
FROM organizations o
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = o.primaryAdminId
WHERE o.name LIKE '%Yamany%' OR o.name LIKE '%YDH%'
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3DLEw35gkkimUcv.eeb1f1cd43d3 --database 6e38zfddYazj4vVoRnY5Mj --execute
